intro_p2: A shared relationship vision is a joint guide for your partnership. It is a gentle reminder of your shared values — the kind of couple you want to be and the future you want to build together, even during challenging seasons.
intro_no_wrong: There are no right or wrong answers here.
values_title: What values feel most important to your relationship right now?
values_subtitle: Choose 1–3 values that represent your core pillars as a couple.
reflection_being_label: As a couple, we want to be partners who ________.
reflection_being_placeholder: e.g. communicate with patience and listen with respect
reflection_life_label: Right now, we want our relationship to feel more ________.
reflection_life_placeholder: e.g. secure, connected, and full of playfulness
mission_so_my_life: , so our relationship can feel more
mission_saved: Your shared relationship vision has been saved.
mission_not_rule: This is not a rigid rule.
mission_is_reminder: It is a gentle compass for your partnership.
mission_return_whenever: You can return to it whenever you need to realign and reconnect.
history_empty: You haven't saved any relationship visions yet.
history_empty_hint: When you're ready, create one and it will appear here.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

app_description: Create a shared vision for your relationship and align on the future you want to build together.
instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
